title: — Synopsis
text:
Generate static Pod manifest file for local etcd
kubeadm init phase etcd [flags]

-h, --help
help for etcd
help for etcd

--rootfs string
The path to the 'real' host root filesystem. This will cause kubeadm to chroot into the provided path.
